name: designer-handoff
description: Generates UI design spec via ui-ux-pro-max and hands off to frontend agent

positive_triggers.input: Generate UI design spec for our React project
Frontend agent keeps using AI purple gradients, give it design rules
positive_triggers.reason: Frontend needs constraints to avoid anti-patterns

positive_triggers.input: Hand off design to frontend implementation

negative_triggers.reason: No UI, no design spec needed

negative_triggers.input: Designer already gave me Figma mockups
negative_triggers.reason: Already have design spec, use it directly

behavioral_evals.scenario: User asks: 'Generate UI design spec for our React project'
expected_behavior: Agent verifies ui-ux-pro-max-cli installed + OpenCode integration initialized
Agent reads spec for project type (SaaS / Fintech / E-commerce / etc.), tech stack, mood
Agent invokes ui-ux-pro-max generate with appropriate flags
Agent adds Phase 1.5: UI Design Spec to task_plan.md
Agent documents frontend agent contract (read spec first, follow rules, run pre-delivery checklist)

behavioral_evals.scenario: Frontend agent starts writing UI code
expected_behavior: Agent reads design-spec.md BEFORE writing any UI file
Agent references design-spec.md in code comments where rules apply
Agent runs pre-delivery checklist before commit (WCAG, focus states, prefers-reduced-motion)
Agent rejects UI code that violates spec (in code review)

notes: Behavioral evals are warning-level until promoted via upstream issue tracker.
